subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-21
subcodes.first_line: When I was in Paris, a wealthy man invited me to a restaurant to have dinner. For his sake I went. For each person's meal they charged one pound.
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @stories; anecdotes, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @hospitality, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
